title.en: What seems wrong with the product?
title.zh-Hans: 这个产品看起来哪里有问题？

label.en: It seems faulty, poor quality, or not working properly
label.zh-Hans: 它似乎有故障、质量差，或无法正常工作

label.en: I'm not sure whether it is a quality problem or a safety problem
label.zh-Hans: 我不确定这是质量问题还是安全问题

title.en: What have you done so far?
title.zh-Hans: 到目前为止你做了什么？

label.en: I stopped using it, but I have not contacted the seller yet
label.zh-Hans: 我已经停止使用，但还没有联系卖家

label.en: I have started collecting photos, receipts, or other evidence
label.zh-Hans: 我已经开始收集照片、收据或其他证据

label.en: I contacted the seller once, but I did not get a clear answer
label.zh-Hans: 我联系过卖家一次，但没有得到明确答复

label.en: The seller said the problem is normal or not serious
label.zh-Hans: 卖家说这是正常情况，或问题并不严重

label.en: The issue is still not resolved
I think it may still be unsafe to use
label.zh-Hans: 我觉得它现在用起来可能仍然不安全

label.en: I need to organise my evidence
I am still waiting for a clear reply
The seller keeps saying the problem is normal or not serious
label.zh-Hans: 卖家一直说这是正常情况，或问题并不严重

label.en: The issue is still not resolved
